$comment: One-pager content contract. The reader grasps the point in 30 seconds. Length target: EN 200-350 words, CN 400-600 characters. Metrics are the headline, not supporting evidence. No opening ceremony.

metrics.$comment: 3-4 cards, numbers first. If the cards do not tell the story, the metrics are wrong.

argument.$comment: 1-2 paragraphs. The lead sentence carries the single sharpest claim, not context-setting.

evidence.$comment: Each bullet is evidence, not a restated argument: fact + number + so-what.
